transcript.text:
(Market showdown) I got a gift certificate worth 2 million won
(Spend 2 million won in the market challenge) I'll try everything I want to eat
Tteokbokki, fish bread, kimchi-jeon, pollack-jeon* *Fried pancakes with various ingredients
Meat-jeon, stir-fried pork with eel, Seodae braised potatoes
Sweet and sour seaweed salad, chicken neck
(What's next?) What else is delicious in the market here?
If you order 2 bowls of gukbap, you’ll get braised meat free of charge!
It’s mindblowing, their kimchi and stuff
(Let me tell you about Suncheon's gukbap) A standard Suncheon gukbap starts with 2 bowls
(Their service is on another level!)
(A bowl of gukbap to finish)
(Eleven kinds?!) I ate about 11 dishes
Believe it or not
(Suncheonman National Garden)
Hello, everyone
I came to Suncheon today

(Best trail course for the perfect meal) This is the 'Suncheonman National Garden'
It's absolutely beautiful
(A landmark in Suncheon, where the entire city is one big garden)
(A creek path in the garden with clear water flowing)
From last April,
(Suncheon, a garden city, is the ecological capital of Korea!) the 2023 Suncheonman National Garden Expo was held here
(Visit the garden city this summer) They said it would be until October 31st
It's been less than 3 months since the expo started
In 84 days, they had over 5 million visitors
Isn't that 1/10 of the population?
(The lush nature that’s filled with the scent of summer...) Probably because of the grand trees and the nature
It's also quite windy and feels refreshing
(Perfect for a summer getaway!) It would be nice to visit here in the summer
(All the grass is also open and you can step on it) Usually, it’s prohibited to enter the grass fields in parks, right?
But it's all open here
(2023 Suncheonman National Garden Expo) So I'm stepping on the grass right now

I've never seen such a large and beautiful garden
(Shameless) (Come to think of it, I'm also called garden...)
Since I looked around the garden,
let’s go eat some delicious food at the market
(Suncheon's fifth-day market is held twice a month, on the 2nd and 7th)
(A place full of appetizing food)
I’m in front of the market now
There are three markets around here
They're the Yeokjeon market, and the north and south markets
(Local currency of Suncheon with a monthly cash limit of 300,000 won per person) Today, I got a gift certificate
that is worth 2 million won!
With this gift certificate today, within the given time limit,
I'm going to try everything I want to eat
(Unfortunately, no day or night market opens today!)
Smells like a traditional market!
(Nose navigation ON) It’s a jeon* restaurant! *Fried pancake with various ingredients

It’s next to a place that serves jeon
Today's appetizer starts with jeon
Oh!
- Why is Tzuyang here?! - Hello, do you know me?
(Recommends the pollack-jeon and leaves) Try the pollack-jeon first
- Pollock-jeon? - It's super good
Is it really delicious?
Since I have to try a lot of places today,
I can’t order too much at once
Excuse me!
(First order) I’ll have one kimchi-jeon,
one meat-jeon,
and one pollock-jeon, please
(Pollack-jeon with plenty of eggs)
(Thin and crispy kimchi-jeon)
(Juicy meat-jeon)

Wow, that looks delicious! Thank you
- Thank you! - Should I cut it?
Bon appétit
The kimchi-jeon has shrimp in it!
Looks delicious
(Amazing!) It’s freshly fried jeon, so it tastes amazing
This kimchi...
(This excites me) they used the tasty aged kimchi
(Time for the meat-jeon) Meat-jeon!
This meat-jeon is so good! So delicious
(Looking forward to the recommended pollack-jeon) This is the highly recommended menu
They fried one whole pollack
Is this the true pollock-jeon...?
Wow, this is so delicious, the egg tastes so...
(Night market held on Fridays and Saturdays) It's a night market here, so it’ll be nice to eat this
in the wind... it's pretty breezy here

(Perfect combination) It would be great to have a few drinks on a breezy day
First of all, the vibe is so good
I love the itinerary today
(The perfect spot to visit after a walk in Suncheonman National Garden)
(Even the price is cheap...) Three of this all together costs...
Wait, if I only use 9,000 won here
when can I spend up to 2 million won...?
What else is delicious in the market here?
The gukbap is famous
The gukbap? Oh really?
Suncheon Market has many restaurants!
(Gukbap goes on the list) I should try the gukbap, too
Thank you
I'm done eating here
How is it so soft?
(Already down to the last piece) Amazing

The last meat-jeon!
(It was perfect until the last bite)
I finished a light appetizer
Now let's move on to the next place
Bill, please! Do you take gift certificates?
Yes!
I enjoyed the meal so much!
- Thank you - Thank you!
Next up is!
(I can't resist the marketplace tteokbokki) It's tteokbokki!
Looks delicious! Tteokbokki is a must at markets
(Sound of Tzuyang ordering only 1 serving) Excuse me, can I have 1 serving of tteokbokki?
Your tteokbokki is here!
Thank you!
Can I directly eat these fish cakes?
Yes, pick anything you want to eat

(Eats up the fish cakes)
(Even tastier with a traditional market vibe)
Did you eat the gukbap?
No, I haven't eaten it yet
(Come on, girl)
You must try the gukbap
(Don't worry, I can eat 20 ramen noodles)
Really?
Believe it or not
Excuse me! Can I pay with a gift certificate?
- Yes, of course - Really?
- Thanks for the meal - Thank you
- Goodbye! - Goodbye
(There are all kinds of foods that look delicious...)
They all look like delicious eateries here...
They look like the traditional, old eateries that are great in taste

(A restaurant spotted on her radar) Let's try this place! Looks pretty good!
Grilled fish!
Grilled fish sounds delicious!
Grilled fish...
Wow, what's this?!
Is this a razor shell?
(A bucket full of razor clams) Yes, it is! They even got razor clams
Razor clams look so delicious
Excuse me, what's good here?
The clams are in season now
The sole and braised potatoes are in season, too
The sole!
Please recommend one more!
Stir-fried pork with eel!
Stir-fried pork with eel?
Then I'll order those three!

Thank you
(Seasonal salad made with razor clams)
(An intriguing fresh combination! Stir-fried pork with eel)
(The highlight, sole braised potato) Thank you!
Is this the sole?
That's one chubby sole
So this is the braised sole
Bon appétit
Let's start with the braised sole!
(Thick braised sole) This is quite popular here...
Instead of radishes,
I prefer adding potatoes to braised stew
Let's try the potato first
(The former potato lady is happy)
It's perfectly cooked!
Sole meat is so easy to separate from the bone

Just pull it like this, then voila!
Fresh sole is only caught around this season
This is the fresh sole? Not the dried ones?
Oh, I see
(No wonder it tasted better) It tasted a little different from dried sole
Apparently it isn't the dried one, it's the fresh one
I wonder
how stir-fried pork
(The curious stir-fried pork and eel combo) will taste with eel
Let's try it with the stir-fried pork
This eel...
Apparently, Suncheon is also famous for conger eels
Sweet and sour clam salad
(The salad tastes amazing with zucchini) It's mixed with steamed zucchini
Let's top it with a bit of zucchini
Wow, the razor clams are really plump!

It's really big and really fresh
And also very chewy
(Let's share the good stuff) I'm with the staff of the local government here
I'll share this salad with them
I still have to eat at different places anyway
Is that enough?
Thank you!
The razor clams are really chubby
(Full of razor clam meat!) It fills my mouth!
Let's try it with the eel
Wait a minute, I have to try this
I think it's the sole roe
Fresh sedae tastes different...
It is the roe!
(Lay it down properly)
(Bring to a boil more)

Nice!
The roe is huge, right?
I'll try it
It's delicious
(Not chicken feet, they’re razor clams...!) It looks like chicken feet!
So delicious...
(Ending with a wrap!) Let's wrap this up!
(A satisfying nod)
I ate so well!
The bill, please!
115,000 won
(She’s finally over 100,000 won) I'll be able to use up a bit this time
- Thank you - Thank you
There’s fish bread right in front of the store!
This is the one with cream inside
(One cream and one red bean) Cream fish bread?

(One cream and one red bean) Thank you!
- Looks delicious! I love the cream one - This is the red bean
Thank you!
It's so good!
(Heading to the next restaurant with fish bread in her mouth) Where should I go now?
Here
(Attracted by a cute name!) This place is called ‘Todak Todak’, it’s so cute
Hello!
I heard your grilled chicken is delicious
It looks delicious only when people like us
with a huge belly eats
(The owner didn't know Tzuyang haha) How can this beautiful lady film a mukbang?
What's good here?
(Chicken neck recommended by the owner) Is neck meat delicious?
Then I’ll take that
Just 2 servings, please

If it doesn't taste good, I tell people not to pay
Are you serious?
There's no one who never did that yet!
Really?
It's pre-grilled already
Can I just put it on the grill and eat it?
(Chicken neck is pre-grilled)
Can I eat it?
Bon appétit
Wow, let’s try the chicken neck
(A true reaction... (mouthwatering))
So good!
I should definitely pay hahaha
(Smiles)
I've been eating a lot of chicken neck lately
This is the best one I had so far

(Simply impressed)
It's delicious!
It's so tender
The scent is also very good
The charcoal scent is so good
(Speeds up)
Hurry up and put it on!
I like the fact that it's already pre-grilled
I can eat it right away
In fact, when I think of Suncheon, I have a bad memory
I did a parody video for [Kingdom]
(Netflix [Kingdom] parody 'Muk-dom') There’s a really nice folk village here
(Recommended tourist spot! Naganeupseong Walled Town) I remember it was a really nice place to go and play
This is already the last piece!
That was delicious
I really enjoyed the meal!

- So pretty - Thank you!
After such a long time,
it's nice to have a variety of food at the market
(Most highly recommended) Next up is Suncheon most representative food
(Finally to the gukbap street) I can't miss on gukbap, so let's go straight to it
(How does a sparrow pass by a mill?) There is a rice cake shop here!
You must visit the rice cake shop in traditional markets
(Shopping for rice cake as a dessert!)
This is the gijeongtteok*! *Korean rice cake made with rice wine
- Is this the famous gijeongtteok? - Yes!
Really?
It doesn't spoil quickly even in summer, it’s fermented food, so it's easy to digest
It doesn't spoil quickly?
(Buys gijeongtteok + recommended rice cake)
It's okay
(The owner gives her some free food) I don't think we can finish it

Thank you
Thank you, ma'am
I'm starting to see some gukbap restaurants!
(She's already been here) This place was on [Hometown Report]
I came here to shoot the gukbap street episode
Yes, it's here! It's been so long!
The street is lined up with gukbap stores
Amazing
It's a gukbap heaven!
(If you come to Suncheon, you must eat gukbap)
(In the broth full of boiled intestines)
(A perfect meal with plenty of free tasters)
Is this included in the menu?
So this is included in the 2 servings of gukbap?
Thank you!
If you order gukbap for two, it comes with free braised meat like this

I'm only having one gukbap, so I gave one to the producer
This looks more expensive than the 2 servings of gukbap!
Bon appétit
There’s minced garlic on top of the gukbap!
Delicious!
It's already seasoned!
I'll just add a little bit
(Adds a pinch of fermented shrimp)
Sundae! *Korean blood sausage
It's also served with sundae
Where should I dip this in?
Should I just eat it?
This sundae is delicious
Wow, the braised meat is so thick
It's so good!
It's so soft and chewy

There's no pig smell, so I love it
Gukbap should be eaten a bit red, right?
Let's add the sauce
Mix it up
Wow, that's spicy
Is this the sonchus leaf?
(Looks like kimchi) No, it is summer radish kimchi?
Looks like summer radish kimchi!
Let's add some rice
(Be aware of the sound)
The broth is so rich
It's so savory and refreshing
(Let's add some fresh kimchi on top) I think this tastes good with fresh kimchi
(I’m sharing the braised meat with the staff who ordered only one gukbap!)
(Throwing away veggies under the guise of sharing...?!)
Eat your greens!

(Plenty of meat, too) Please take my love, hope you enjoy
Thank you, I'll enjoy it
I can finish it!
(Look who's speaking...) Oh, the chief eats a lot, right?
This place has amazing gukbap
(Gukbap is such a wholesome meal!)
What did I eat at the market today?
(Quite a lot...) I don't remember
(Today's menu) Tteokbokki down, fish bread down
Kimchi-jeon, pollack-jeon, meat-jeon, stir-fried pork with eel
Sole with braised potatoes, sweet and sour clam salad, chicken neck
Is that it?
Soup, braised meat
(Cleared up 11 types of food!) I ate about 11
I didn't spend much money because it's a market
I don't think I even spent 200,000 won here

Let's try it with the napa cabbage this time
(Picnic of memories)
When I was in high school, I ate this every day
It was so annoying that it only took three bites to finish
I'm still annoyed
I can finish this in 10 minutes
How can this fill you up?
Delicious!
The broth is really neat and doesn't smell at all
(Using both cheeks)
(Looking around)
There's a queue of people in the restaurant
They're queuing up outside
Let's quickly eat and leave!
This broth is
very rich and tasty

(Done eating)
That was a nice meal!
I really enjoyed the meal
Do you take gift certificates?
- Yes - Then I'll use it
I ate 18,000 won including juice!
The juice is for free!
No, no!
What's left if you keep giving out free stuff?
That's why you have to come more often!
The remaining 1,791,000 won will be used to revitalize the Suncheon traditional market
I'll return it back, so I hope it can help!
- Here you go - Thank you
So today, I looked around the Suncheonman National Garden
and ate a lot of delicious food
There are so many things to see and eat here

so it would be great to come with your family or friends, or as a couple
Thanks again for the food!
(How about a trip to Suncheon this summer?)
